hero.title: Move and manage your records
hero.subtitle: Import · export · delete
hero.speech: Before deleting anything important, export a backup first.

import.body: Bring in what another assistant gathered about you, or a past disposition/personality test, sorted into your structure.

export.body: From the store you can gather your records into one text to copy. Handy for a backup or moving elsewhere.

delete.body: Delete one kind, or everything at once. Deletion can't be undone, so export first.

device.body: Lightweight bits like view preferences and first-run hints live only on this device. Unlike your saved records, they reset on their own when you switch devices or clear the app's data.
